event.name: EAA AirVenture Oshkosh 2026
event.description: The world's largest fly-in, held annually at Wittman Regional Airport — for one week, KOSH becomes the busiest control tower on Earth.

bbox.note: Bounding box used for the live traffic query — sized to cover the field, pattern, and the Fisk VFR arrival corridor while keeping OpenSky's area-based anonymous rate limit affordable.
